title: The Giants Explain Their Duel
description: On pages 5–8, the giants explain their duel as mr. 3 and his partners move into position as the giants’ duel and the Straw Hats’ journey become part of a trap.
scene: The Giants Explain Their Duel. Mr. 3 and his partners move into position as the giants’ duel and the Straw Hats’ journey become part of a trap. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: BroGI! Gaba Baba Baba Baba Baba Baba Baba!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: Let me welcome you as my guests!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'd sure like to eat lunch up here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I can also see some weird rock full of holes!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Get down, it's too dangerous! It may seem docile but it's still a dinosaur!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's fine! This guy's only been eating plants!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I don't think it's even taken any notice of me yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Let's go check out those weird holes up ahead!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the giants explain their duel. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
